personal.name: Thamatam Jayaraj
personal.title: B.Tech Computer Science & Data Science Student
personal.bio: Passionate Computer Science student specializing in Data Science and Full Stack Development. Experienced in building AI-powered applications, machine learning workflows, and interactive web platforms. Dedicated to solving complex engineering problems and delivering modern, scalable solutions.

education.institution: VNR Vignana Jyothi Institute of Engineering and Technology
education.degree: Bachelor of Technology - Computer Science - Data Science

projects.title: AI Recruiter – Automated Hiring Platform
projects.description: Built an AI-driven recruitment platform with automated resume parsing and candidate shortlisting to reduce HR workload and speed hiring. Orchestrated multimodal interviews using Gemini and Vapi and deployed a low-latency Supabase system.

projects.title: MySQL Chat AI Assistant
projects.description: Developed an interactive MySQL chatbot, connecting to live databases and interpreting user prompts to generate SQL queries, displaying results instantly and improving non-technical user database accessibility. The project contains under 1000 lines of code.

projects.title: Saarthi – Smart Document Intelligence Assistant
projects.description: Engineered an AI document assistant with OCR, translation, summarization, and metadata extraction. Developed bilingual Q&A using LangChain and Gemini, automated workflows with n8n, and integrated low-latency semantic search using Supabase pgvector for efficient RAG.

projects.title: EcoGamify – Gamified Learning Platform
projects.description: Created a gamified environmental learning platform using Next.js, TypeScript, Three.js, 3D models, and GSAP. Designed multi-level educational games with policy simulation, coding challenges, and interactive conservation experiences.

achievements.title: HackRevolution – 2nd Place
achievements.description: Secured second place in an inter-college hackathon by developing a gamified e-learning platform with interactive lessons, strong user engagement, and notable technical innovation.

achievements.title: SIH Hackathon Winner
achievements.description: Won the institute round and qualified for Smart India Hackathon 2025 finals, delivering impactful innovative solutions collaboratively.

achievements.title: Hacktoberfest Super Contributor
achievements.description: Made 10+ valuable pull requests to major open-source organization repositories, contributing meaningful improvements and earning official Hacktoberfest swags.

achievements.title: Top 9 National Rank
achievements.description: Secured 9th place in Tutedude’s Web Development Hackathon 1.0 for StallOS project, showcasing advanced web development expertise and creativity.

achievements.title: LeetCode Ranking
achievements.description: Achieved a contest ranking of 1619, placing in the top 15% of global participants.

certifications.name: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Generative AI Professional
certifications.description: Earned certification in OCI Generative AI, demonstrating expertise in model deployment, prompt engineering, and secure cloud-based AI solutions.

certifications.name: Smart Coder in DSA
certifications.description: Completed the Smart Coder program, gaining strong foundations in Data Structures and Algorithms through rigorous practice and structured learning.

certifications.name: MERN Stack Certification
certifications.description: Completed a comprehensive MERN Stack program covering MongoDB, Express, React, and Node.js with hands-on projects and full-stack development practices.

extracurriculars.title: Roland Octapad SPD-30
extracurriculars.description: Perform and practice rhythmic compositions on the Roland Octapad SPD-30, demonstrating discipline, coordination, and creative expression.

extracurriculars.title: Hackathons & Innovation
extracurriculars.description: Actively participate in technical hackathons, collaborating in teams to build innovative solutions under time constraints.
